canonical_sl.event: Sodelavec si med sestankom pripiše izključno avtorstvo rešitve.

facts.text: Sodelavec je izjavil, da je sam zasnoval predstavljeno rešitev.
Časovno označen zapis repozitorija kaže avtorstvo osebe self pred prispevkom sodelavca.
Vodja lahko po pregledu zapisa popravi uradni zapis sestanka; mehanizem popravka je enak pri javni ali zasebni predložitvi.
Način predložitve ne spremeni plače, lastništva zapisa ali vodjeve pristojnosti.
Ni dodane grožnje povračilnega ukrepa; prisotni so nevtralni ali podporni.
Popravek avtorstva je lahko viden imenovanemu občinstvu: vodji in šestim članom projektne ekipe.
Sodelavec je trenutno v središču ob projekciji, self pa je viden ob robu skupine.
Če vodja potrdi zapis med sestankom, bo popravljeno avtorstvo javno priznano pred isto projektno ekipo.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo vodja zapis ocenil kot dokončen dokaz.
Ni znano, kako se bo sodelavec odzval na preverjanje zapisa.

options.description: Med sestankom takoj pokaži zapis in izpodbije trditev.
Po sestanku zasebno pokaži zapis vodji.
Zapisa ne pokaži in ne odpri vprašanja zaslug.

operational_en.event: A colleague claims sole authorship of the solution during a meeting.

facts.text: The colleague stated that they alone designed the presented solution.
A timestamped repository record shows self's authorship before the colleague's contribution.
After reviewing the record, the leader can correct the official meeting record; the correction mechanism is the same for public or private presentation.
The presentation channel does not change pay, record ownership, or the leader's authority.
No retaliation threat is added; those present are neutral or supportive.
The authorship correction can be visible to a named audience: the leader and six project-team members.
The colleague is currently centered beside the projection, while self is visible at the edge of the group.
If the leader confirms the record during the meeting, corrected authorship will be publicly recognized before the same project team.

unknowns.text: Whether the leader will treat the record as conclusive evidence is unknown.
How the colleague will respond to record verification is unknown.

options.description: Display the record during the meeting and challenge the statement immediately.
Display the record privately to the leader after the meeting.
Do not display the record or raise the authorship issue.

time_sequence: The statement occurs before either evidence-presentation option.
Public presentation occurs during the meeting; private presentation occurs after it.
The leader reviews the same record before any official correction.
racio.explicit_goal: Preserve accurate authorship in the official meeting record.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: The leader receives the evidence during the meeting; official correction still depends on the leader's assessment.
The leader receives the same evidence after the meeting; official correction still depends on the same assessment.
The leader receives no evidence through these options and the official claim remains unchallenged.

racio.opportunity_cost: Immediate presentation interrupts the active meeting; delayed presentation leaves the claim uncorrected until review.
racio.enforceability_control: The timestamped record is grounded evidence, and the leader controls the official meeting correction; self does not control the leader's assessment.

emocio.current_scene: The colleague is centered beside the shared projection; self is visible at the edge before the leader and six project-team members.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is visibly centered as the recognized author before the same named audience, while the colleague remains present without an asserted humiliation outcome.
emocio.broken_scene: The colleague occupies the visible authorship position and self's contribution is absent from the group image.
emocio.self_position: At the edge of the current group image.
emocio.audience: Leader and six named project-team members.
emocio.attention_recognition: Attention is currently on the colleague; corrected authorship can move recognition to self before the group.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The colleague's sole-authorship claim and the record's current invisibility are the obstacles.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Public display changes the active meeting image immediately; private display changes only the later leader-facing image.

option_visible_changes.change: Self moves beside the projection, the record becomes visible to the group, and recognition can change if the leader confirms it.
Self and the leader view the record after the meeting; the wider group image does not change at that moment.
The colleague remains centered and the authorship record remains outside the visible group image.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's authorship boundary and continued ability to function in the work group.
instinkt.danger_types: No physical danger or retaliation is grounded; bounded interpersonal tension remains possible.
instinkt.possible_loss: Authorship attribution can remain lost; an evidence challenge can create an unknown colleague response.
instinkt.trust_distrust: The leader's assessment and the colleague's response are bounded unknowns.
instinkt.boundary: The timestamped record can support an authorship boundary, but only the leader controls official correction.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: A displayed record cannot be made unseen; a later official correction can recover attribution.
instinkt.familiarity: The event occurs in the existing work group and meeting process.
instinkt.recoverability: Attribution is recoverable through the leader's official correction; colleague response remains unknown.

option_consequences.consequence: The boundary is asserted immediately; no added retaliation is grounded, but the colleague response is unknown.
The boundary is asserted to the leader after the meeting with the same official correction mechanism.
No immediate interpersonal exposure is added, but the authorship boundary remains unasserted.

canonical_sl.event: Sodelavec si med sestankom pripiše izključno avtorstvo rešitve.

facts.text: Sodelavec je izjavil, da je sam zasnoval predstavljeno rešitev.
Časovno označen zapis repozitorija kaže avtorstvo osebe self pred prispevkom sodelavca.
Vodja lahko po pregledu zapisa popravi uradni zapis sestanka; mehanizem popravka je enak pri javni ali zasebni predložitvi.
Način predložitve ne spremeni plače, lastništva zapisa ali vodjeve pristojnosti.
Ni dodane grožnje povračilnega ukrepa; prisotni so nevtralni ali podporni.
Na sestanku so samo self, sodelavec in vodja; širšega občinstva ni.
Sodelavec je trenutno v središču ob projekciji pred vodjo, self pa stoji ob strani.
Če vodja potrdi zapis, bo popravljeno avtorstvo sporočeno samo selfu in sodelavcu brez širšega javnega priznanja.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo vodja zapis ocenil kot dokončen dokaz.
Ni znano, kako se bo sodelavec odzval na preverjanje zapisa.

options.description: Med sestankom takoj pokaži zapis in izpodbije trditev.
Po sestanku zasebno pokaži zapis vodji.
Zapisa ne pokaži in ne odpri vprašanja zaslug.

facts.text: The colleague stated that they alone designed the presented solution.
A timestamped repository record shows self's authorship before the colleague's contribution.
After reviewing the record, the leader can correct the official meeting record; the correction mechanism is the same for public or private presentation.
The presentation channel does not change pay, record ownership, or the leader's authority.
No retaliation threat is added; those present are neutral or supportive.
Only self, the colleague, and the leader are in the meeting; there is no wider audience.
The colleague is currently centered beside the projection before the leader, while self stands to the side.
If the leader confirms the record, corrected authorship will be communicated only to self and the colleague without wider public recognition.

unknowns.text: Whether the leader will treat the record as conclusive evidence is unknown.
How the colleague will respond to record verification is unknown.

options.description: Display the record during the meeting and challenge the statement immediately.
Display the record privately to the leader after the meeting.
Do not display the record or raise the authorship issue.

time_sequence: The statement occurs before either evidence-presentation option.
Public presentation occurs during the meeting; private presentation occurs after it.
The leader reviews the same record before any official correction.
racio.explicit_goal: Preserve accurate authorship in the official meeting record.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: The leader receives the evidence during the meeting; official correction still depends on the leader's assessment.
The leader receives the same evidence after the meeting; official correction still depends on the same assessment.
The leader receives no evidence through these options and the official claim remains unchallenged.

racio.opportunity_cost: Immediate presentation interrupts the active meeting; delayed presentation leaves the claim uncorrected until review.
racio.enforceability_control: The timestamped record is grounded evidence, and the leader controls the official meeting correction; self does not control the leader's assessment.

emocio.current_scene: The colleague is centered beside the shared projection before the leader; self stands to the side, and no wider audience is present.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is visibly centered as the recognized author before the leader and colleague, without a wider recognition scene or an asserted humiliation outcome.
emocio.broken_scene: The colleague occupies the visible authorship position before the leader and self's contribution is absent from that small scene.
emocio.self_position: At the side of the current three-person scene.
emocio.audience: Leader and colleague only; no wider audience.
emocio.attention_recognition: Attention is currently on the colleague; corrected authorship can move recognition to self only within the three-person scene.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The colleague's sole-authorship claim and the record's current invisibility are the obstacles.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Public display changes the active three-person meeting image immediately; private display changes only the later leader-facing image.

option_visible_changes.change: Self moves beside the projection, the record becomes visible to the leader and colleague, and recognition can change if the leader confirms it.
Self and the leader view the record after the meeting; no wider group image exists to change.
The colleague remains centered before the leader and the record stays outside the visible scene.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's authorship boundary and continued ability to function in the work group.
instinkt.danger_types: No physical danger or retaliation is grounded; bounded interpersonal tension remains possible.
instinkt.possible_loss: Authorship attribution can remain lost; an evidence challenge can create an unknown colleague response.
instinkt.trust_distrust: The leader's assessment and the colleague's response are bounded unknowns.
instinkt.boundary: The timestamped record can support an authorship boundary, but only the leader controls official correction.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: A displayed record cannot be made unseen; a later official correction can recover attribution.
instinkt.familiarity: The event occurs in the existing work group and meeting process.
instinkt.recoverability: Attribution is recoverable through the leader's official correction; colleague response remains unknown.

option_consequences.consequence: The boundary is asserted immediately; no added retaliation is grounded, but the colleague response is unknown.
The boundary is asserted to the leader after the meeting with the same official correction mechanism.
No immediate interpersonal exposure is added, but the authorship boundary remains unasserted.

canonical_sl.event: Self se odloča o redkem potovanju na privlačno oddaljeno obalo.

facts.text: Potovanje stane 38 odstotkov trenutno prostega proračuna.
Nakup po rezervaciji ni finančno vračljiv.
Oddaljena obala, načrtovana pot in doživetje so za self izrecno privlačni.
Na cilju je potrjena delavnica, ki selfu nadomesti primerljivo lokalno usposabljanje v vrednosti 400 EUR.
Ista pot je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Self potuje sam in nima zaupanja vrednega spremljevalca.
Pot in okolje sta selfu neznana.
Ponudnik nastanitve in lokalnega prevoza še ni preverjen.
Fizična povratna pot nima potrjene rezervacije ali preverjene nadomestne poti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, ali bo ob načrtovanem času na voljo zanesljiva fizična povratna pot.

options.description: Rezerviraj opisano oddaljeno potovanje.
Izberi cenejši lokalni izlet brez oddaljene poti.
Ne rezerviraj potovanja in ostani doma.

operational_en.event: Self is deciding about a rare trip to an attractive distant coast.

facts.text: The trip costs 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The purchase is financially non-refundable after booking.
The distant coast, planned route, and experience are explicitly attractive to self.
A confirmed workshop at the destination replaces comparable local training worth EUR 400 for self.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
Self travels alone and has no trusted companion.
The route and environment are unfamiliar to self.
The lodging and local transport providers have not been verified.
The physical return path has no confirmed booking or verified alternate route.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
Whether a reliable physical return path will be available at the planned time is unknown.

options.description: Book the described distant trip.
Take a cheaper local trip without the distant route.
Do not book travel and remain at home.

time_sequence: The purchase decision precedes the non-refundable commitment.
The destination workshop occurs during the trip.
Possible future costs occur after the purchase.
racio.explicit_goal: Decide whether the training benefit justifies the budget commitment.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Self spends 38 percent of the discretionary budget and receives the confirmed EUR 400 training replacement if the destination is reached.
Self spends a smaller unquantified amount and does not receive the destination workshop.
Self preserves the discretionary budget and does not receive the destination workshop.

racio.opportunity_cost: Booking commits funds that cannot cover unknown future costs; not booking gives up the confirmed training replacement.
racio.enforceability_control: The purchase refund rule and workshop confirmation are grounded; physical travel operations are not controlled by self.

emocio.current_scene: Self stands before an open distant-coast route and a local route; no public audience is present.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is centered in active movement toward the attractive coast and the new experience.
emocio.broken_scene: Self remains before closed routes with no travel movement or new coast experience.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The unchosen route and the booking decision are visible obstacles; no human rival is present.
emocio.attraction_enjoyment: The distant coast and experience are explicitly attractive; the local route has a smaller but present movement image.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Booking starts the distant route, the local option starts nearby movement, and staying home leaves self in place.

option_visible_changes.change: The distant coast becomes the active route and self begins distant movement.
The distant route closes and self begins a smaller local movement scene.
Both travel routes remain inactive and self remains in the home scene.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's physical integrity, ability to return, trusted attachment context, and necessary cash reserve.
instinkt.danger_types: Unfamiliar route, unverified lodging and transport, travel alone, and uncertain physical return path.
instinkt.possible_loss: Possible physical stranding, unverified-provider harm, separation without trusted support, and 38 percent reserve exposure.
instinkt.trust_distrust: No trusted companion is present; lodging and transport providers are unverified.
instinkt.attachment_care: No trusted close person accompanies self; attachment support during the trip is absent.
instinkt.scarcity: Booking exposes 38 percent of the discretionary budget under a non-refundable rule.
instinkt.boundary: Purchase terms are fixed; provider safety boundaries are not verified.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: The financial purchase is irreversible and the physical return route is uncertain.
instinkt.familiarity: The distant route and environment are unfamiliar; the local route and home are familiar.
instinkt.recoverability: Financial recovery is unavailable after booking; physical recovery is bounded unknown because no return route is confirmed.

option_consequences.consequence: Self enters the unfamiliar route alone with unverified providers, uncertain physical return, and non-refundable reserve exposure.
Self avoids the distant provider and return-path uncertainties while accepting a smaller, unquantified local cost.
Self avoids the travel commitment and preserves the reserve; no claim is made that home is universally free of danger.

canonical_sl.event: Self se odloča o redkem potovanju na privlačno oddaljeno obalo.

facts.text: Potovanje stane 38 odstotkov trenutno prostega proračuna.
Nakup po rezervaciji ni finančno vračljiv.
Oddaljena obala, načrtovana pot in doživetje so za self izrecno privlačni.
Na cilju je potrjena delavnica, ki selfu nadomesti primerljivo lokalno usposabljanje v vrednosti 400 EUR.
Ista pot je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
S selfom potuje zaupanja vredna bližnja oseba z več skupnimi potovanji.
Cilj je oddaljen, vendar je celotna pot vnaprej dokumentirana in pregledana s spremljevalcem.
Nastanitev in lokalni prevoz imata preverjene rezervacije ter preverjene ponudnike.
Fizična povratna pot ima potrjeno rezervacijo in dokumentirano nadomestno povezavo.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.

options.description: Rezerviraj opisano oddaljeno potovanje.
Izberi cenejši lokalni izlet brez oddaljene poti.
Ne rezerviraj potovanja in ostani doma.

operational_en.event: Self is deciding about a rare trip to an attractive distant coast.

facts.text: The trip costs 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The purchase is financially non-refundable after booking.
The distant coast, planned route, and experience are explicitly attractive to self.
A confirmed workshop at the destination replaces comparable local training worth EUR 400 for self.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
A trusted close person with several shared trips travels with self.
The destination is distant, but the entire route has been documented and reviewed with the companion.
The lodging and local transport have confirmed reservations with verified providers.
The physical return path has a confirmed booking and a documented alternate connection.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.

options.description: Book the described distant trip.
Take a cheaper local trip without the distant route.
Do not book travel and remain at home.

time_sequence: The purchase decision precedes the non-refundable commitment.
The destination workshop occurs during the trip.
Possible future costs occur after the purchase.
racio.explicit_goal: Decide whether the training benefit justifies the budget commitment.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Self spends 38 percent of the discretionary budget and receives the confirmed EUR 400 training replacement if the destination is reached.
Self spends a smaller unquantified amount and does not receive the destination workshop.
Self preserves the discretionary budget and does not receive the destination workshop.

racio.opportunity_cost: Booking commits funds that cannot cover unknown future costs; not booking gives up the confirmed training replacement.
racio.enforceability_control: The purchase refund rule and workshop confirmation are grounded; physical travel operations are not controlled by self.

emocio.current_scene: Self stands before an open distant-coast route and a local route; a close companion is present, but no public audience is present.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is centered in active movement toward the attractive coast and the new experience; no extra enjoyment is inferred from companion presence.
emocio.broken_scene: Self remains before closed routes with no travel movement or new coast experience.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The unchosen route and the booking decision are visible obstacles; no human rival is present.
emocio.attraction_enjoyment: The distant coast and experience are explicitly attractive; the local route has a smaller but present movement image.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Booking starts the distant route, the local option starts nearby movement, and staying home leaves self in place.

option_visible_changes.change: The distant coast becomes the active route and self begins distant movement.
The distant route closes and self begins a smaller local movement scene.
Both travel routes remain inactive and self remains in the home scene.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's physical integrity, ability to return, trusted attachment context, and necessary cash reserve.
instinkt.danger_types: Distant travel remains a general exposure, while the route, lodging, transport, and return path are verified.
instinkt.possible_loss: The 38 percent reserve exposure remains; no unverified-provider or unsupported-return loss is grounded.
instinkt.trust_distrust: A trusted close companion is present; lodging and transport providers are verified.
instinkt.attachment_care: The close companion provides grounded attachment support during the trip.
instinkt.scarcity: Booking exposes 38 percent of the discretionary budget under a non-refundable rule.
instinkt.boundary: Purchase terms are fixed; lodging, transport, and return arrangements have documented boundaries.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: The financial purchase is irreversible, while the physical return path has a confirmed route and alternate connection.
instinkt.familiarity: The distant location is not home, but the route has been reviewed and the companion has shared travel history.
instinkt.prior_association: Several completed shared trips with the companion are grounded; no outcome beyond that history is inferred.
instinkt.recoverability: Financial recovery is unavailable after booking; physical return has a confirmed route and alternate connection.

option_consequences.consequence: Self enters the documented distant route with a trusted companion, verified providers, confirmed physical return, and non-refundable reserve exposure.
Self avoids the distant commitment while accepting a smaller, unquantified local cost.
Self avoids the travel commitment and preserves the reserve; no claim is made that home is universally free of danger.

canonical_sl.event: Oseba prosi self za posojilo za nujno popravilo doma.

facts.text: Predložen račun potrjuje nujno popravilo doma v vrednosti 9000 EUR.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov selfove denarne rezerve.
Omejena možnost znaša 3000 EUR in vključuje pisni dvanajstmesečni rok vračila; polna možnost nima nove pogodbe.
Odnos selfu ne prinaša poslovne, lastniške ali druge materialne koristi.
Prosilec je selfov bližnji prijatelj z dvanajstletno skupno zgodovino.
Self izrecno poroča o močni navezanosti in strahu, da bi odnos izgubil.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo novo posojilo vrnjeno pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.
Ni znano, ali bo self v naslednjih šestih mesecih potreboval večji del rezerve.

options.description: Posodi celotnih 9000 EUR brez nove pogodbe.
Posodi 3000 EUR s pisnim dvanajstmesečnim rokom vračila.
Ne posodi denarja.

operational_en.event: A person asks self for a loan for an urgent home repair.

facts.text: A submitted invoice confirms an urgent home repair costing EUR 9000.
Two previous repayments were more than three months late.
The full amount is 45 percent of self's cash reserve.
The limited option is EUR 3000 with a written twelve-month repayment date; the full option has no new contract.
The relationship provides no business, ownership, or other material benefit to self.
The borrower is self's close friend with twelve years of shared history.
Self explicitly reports strong attachment and fear of losing the relationship.

unknowns.text: Whether a new loan will be repaid on time is unknown.
How each option will affect the relationship is unknown.
Whether self will need a large part of the reserve during the next six months is unknown.

options.description: Lend the full EUR 9000 without a new contract.
Lend EUR 3000 with a written twelve-month repayment date.
Lend no money.

time_sequence: Two prior repayments were late before the current request.
Any transfer occurs now.
The limited written repayment date occurs twelve months later.
racio.explicit_goal: Protect self's liquidity and enforceable repayment position while deciding whether to fund the repair.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Self exposes 45 percent of the reserve without a new repayment contract.
Self exposes EUR 3000 under a written twelve-month repayment date.
Self retains the reserve and acquires no repayment claim.
The confirmed EUR 9000 repair invoice can be fully funded.
The confirmed repair receives EUR 3000 and remains partly unfunded.
The confirmed repair receives no funds from self.

racio.opportunity_cost: Transferred money cannot cover self's unknown six-month reserve needs; retained money does not fund the borrower's repair.
racio.enforceability_control: The limited option has a written date but repayment capacity and enforcement outcome remain unknown; the full option adds no new contract.

emocio.current_scene: Self and the borrower face each other across a table with the repair invoice visible; no audience is present.
emocio.desired_scene: Self remains centered as an active participant in a face-to-face scene where the chosen act and its relationship image are immediately visible.
emocio.broken_scene: Self disappears from the active relationship scene or the chosen act remains visually unresolved.
emocio.attention_recognition: Attention is between self, the borrower, and the visible act; no public recognition is grounded.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The unfunded invoice and uncertainty about the relationship image are obstacles; no rival is present.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Each option creates a different immediate transfer or non-transfer movement.

option_visible_changes.change: The full amount crosses the table and the repair invoice becomes fully funded.
A smaller amount and written date cross the table while part of the invoice remains.
No amount crosses the table and the invoice remains unfunded.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's close attachment, the friend's urgent need, self's reserve, and a workable repayment boundary.
instinkt.danger_types: Possible attachment loss, resource scarcity, repeated late repayment, and an ineffective boundary.
instinkt.possible_loss: Self may lose money needed within six months, may fail to protect a close friend in need, or may lose the relationship.
instinkt.trust_distrust: Twelve years of shared history grounds attachment, while two late repayments ground repayment distrust.
instinkt.attachment_care: The borrower is a close friend; self reports strong attachment and fear of relationship loss, and the repair need is genuine.
instinkt.scarcity: The full amount exposes 45 percent of the reserve; future own costs are unknown.
instinkt.boundary: The limited option adds a written twelve-month date; the full option adds no new contract; decline sets a no-transfer boundary.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: A transfer cannot be immediately reversed; a written claim may support later recovery but does not guarantee it.
instinkt.familiarity: The relationship has twelve years of grounded shared history.
instinkt.prior_association: Two late repayments are grounded prior events; no further motive is inferred.
instinkt.recoverability: Money recovery is unknown; relationship recovery after each option is also unknown.

option_consequences.consequence: The friend's full need is funded and attachment care is enacted, while 45 percent of reserve is exposed without a new boundary.
Part of the need is funded, a written boundary is added, and both money and relationship recovery remain uncertain.
The reserve is retained, the genuine need is not funded by self, and attachment loss remains possible but unknown.

canonical_sl.event: Oseba prosi self za posojilo za nujno popravilo doma.

facts.text: Predložen račun potrjuje nujno popravilo doma v vrednosti 9000 EUR.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov selfove denarne rezerve.
Omejena možnost znaša 3000 EUR in vključuje pisni dvanajstmesečni rok vračila; polna možnost nima nove pogodbe.
Odnos selfu ne prinaša poslovne, lastniške ali druge materialne koristi.
Prosilec je oddaljen znanec, ki ga je self srečal trikrat.
Med selfom in prosilcem ni skupne navezanostne zgodovine ali poročanega strahu pred izgubo odnosa.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo novo posojilo vrnjeno pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.
Ni znano, ali bo self v naslednjih šestih mesecih potreboval večji del rezerve.

options.description: Posodi celotnih 9000 EUR brez nove pogodbe.
Posodi 3000 EUR s pisnim dvanajstmesečnim rokom vračila.
Ne posodi denarja.

The full amount is 45 percent of self's cash reserve.
The limited option is EUR 3000 with a written twelve-month repayment date; the full option has no new contract.
The relationship provides no business, ownership, or other material benefit to self.
The borrower is a distant acquaintance whom self has met three times.
Self and the borrower have no shared attachment history or reported fear of relationship loss.

unknowns.text: Whether a new loan will be repaid on time is unknown.
How each option will affect the relationship is unknown.
Whether self will need a large part of the reserve during the next six months is unknown.

Lend no money.

time_sequence: Two prior repayments were late before the current request.
Any transfer occurs now.
The limited written repayment date occurs twelve months later.
racio.explicit_goal: Protect self's liquidity and enforceable repayment position while deciding whether to fund the repair.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Self exposes 45 percent of the reserve without a new repayment contract.
Self exposes EUR 3000 under a written twelve-month repayment date.
Self retains the reserve and acquires no repayment claim.
The confirmed EUR 9000 repair invoice can be fully funded.
The confirmed repair receives EUR 3000 and remains partly unfunded.
The confirmed repair receives no funds from self.

racio.opportunity_cost: Transferred money cannot cover self's unknown six-month reserve needs; retained money does not fund the borrower's repair.
racio.enforceability_control: The limited option has a written date but repayment capacity and enforcement outcome remain unknown; the full option adds no new contract.

emocio.current_scene: Self and the borrower face each other across a table with the repair invoice visible; no audience is present.
emocio.desired_scene: Self remains centered as an active participant in a face-to-face scene where the chosen act and its relationship image are immediately visible.
emocio.broken_scene: Self disappears from the active relationship scene or the chosen act remains visually unresolved.
emocio.attention_recognition: Attention is between self, the borrower, and the visible act; no public recognition is grounded.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The unfunded invoice and uncertainty about the relationship image are obstacles; no rival is present.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Each option creates a different immediate transfer or non-transfer movement.

option_visible_changes.change: The full amount crosses the table and the repair invoice becomes fully funded.
A smaller amount and written date cross the table while part of the invoice remains.
No amount crosses the table and the invoice remains unfunded.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's reserve, a workable repayment boundary, and the borrower's genuine need without a grounded close attachment.
instinkt.danger_types: Resource scarcity, repeated late repayment, and an ineffective boundary; no close-attachment loss is grounded.
instinkt.possible_loss: Self may lose money needed within six months; the acquaintance's genuine need may remain unmet by self.
instinkt.trust_distrust: Only three meetings and two late repayments ground limited trust and repayment distrust.
instinkt.attachment_care: The repair need is genuine and can activate compassion, but there is no shared attachment history or reported fear of relationship loss.
instinkt.scarcity: The full amount exposes 45 percent of the reserve; future own costs are unknown.
instinkt.boundary: The limited option adds a written twelve-month date; the full option adds no new contract; decline sets a no-transfer boundary.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: A transfer cannot be immediately reversed; a written claim may support later recovery but does not guarantee it.
instinkt.familiarity: The borrower is a distant acquaintance met three times.
instinkt.prior_association: Two late repayments are grounded prior events; no further motive is inferred.
instinkt.recoverability: Money recovery is unknown; the effect on the limited acquaintance relationship is also unknown.

option_consequences.consequence: The full need is funded and compassion can be enacted, while 45 percent of reserve is exposed without a new boundary and no close attachment is grounded.
Part of the need is funded, a written boundary is added, and money recovery remains uncertain without a close attachment.
The reserve is retained, the genuine need is not funded by self, and no close-attachment loss is grounded.

canonical_sl.event: Self se odloča o potovanju na redko in privlačno obalno destinacijo.

facts.text: Destinacija, pot in obalno doživetje so za self izrecno privlačni.
Potovanje stane 1200 EUR oziroma 25 odstotkov prostega proračuna.
Ista ponudba je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Rezervacijo je mogoče preklicati v 24 urah z 10-odstotnim stroškom.
S selfom potuje zaupanja vredna bližnja oseba.
Prevoz, nastanitev in povratna pot so preverjeni.
Pot vključuje podpisano vabilo na predstavitev za kupca, ki selfovemu studiu ob uspešni izvedbi prihrani do 900 EUR zunanjega predstavitvenega stroška.
Izrecni prejemnik omejene strateške in materialne koristi je selfov studio; javnega statusa ali priznanja ni.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, ali bo predstavitev izvedena dovolj uspešno za celoten prihranek.

options.description: Rezerviraj opisano potovanje.
Izberi cenejši lokalni obalni izlet.
Ne rezerviraj potovanja in ostani doma.

operational_en.event: Self is deciding about travel to a rare and attractive coastal destination.

facts.text: The destination, route, and coastal experience are explicitly attractive to self.
The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The same offer was available once during the last three years.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
A trusted close person travels with self.
Transport, lodging, and the return path are verified.
The trip includes a signed invitation to a buyer demonstration that can save self's studio up to EUR 900 in external demonstration costs if delivery succeeds.
The explicit recipient of the bounded strategic and material benefit is self's studio; no public status or recognition is involved.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
Whether the demonstration will be delivered well enough for the full saving is unknown.

options.description: Book the described trip.
Take a cheaper local coastal trip.
Do not book travel and remain at home.

time_sequence: Booking occurs before the 24-hour cancellation boundary.
Travel and the buyer demonstration occur after booking.
Any external-cost saving occurs only if the demonstration is delivered.
racio.explicit_goal: Decide whether the trip advances the studio's demonstration-cost goal within the available budget.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: The studio gains access to a signed buyer demonstration and a bounded saving of up to EUR 900, while self commits EUR 1200.
The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self incurs a smaller unquantified local cost.
The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self preserves the travel budget.

racio.opportunity_cost: Booking commits EUR 1200 that cannot cover other costs; not booking gives up the signed demonstration and bounded studio saving.
racio.enforceability_control: The invitation and cancellation rule are documented; delivery quality and the full saving are not controlled outcomes.

emocio.current_scene: Self and a trusted companion face an attractive distant coast, a smaller local coast, and a home path.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is centered in vivid coastal movement and immediate shared experience, without a public-recognition scene.
emocio.broken_scene: The coast remains outside the active scene and self has no travel movement or new experience.
emocio.self_position: Centered at the route decision point beside the companion.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The inactive route and booking threshold are obstacles; no rival is present.
emocio.attraction_enjoyment: The distant coast is explicitly attractive; the local coast carries a smaller but still grounded experience image.
emocio.movement_immediacy: The distant and local options start different travel scenes; staying home leaves the routes inactive.

option_visible_changes.change: Self and the companion enter the distant coastal route.
Self and the companion enter the smaller local coastal route.
Both coastal routes remain inactive and self stays in the home scene.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's physical integrity, trusted attachment context, return ability, and necessary budget reserve.
instinkt.danger_types: No unverified travel danger is grounded; general travel exposure remains bounded.
instinkt.possible_loss: A 25-percent budget commitment and 10-percent cancellation cost are possible losses.
instinkt.trust_distrust: A trusted close companion and verified providers are grounded.
instinkt.attachment_care: The trusted close companion remains with self through the travel options.
instinkt.scarcity: The distant trip uses 25 percent of the discretionary budget; future major costs are unknown.
instinkt.boundary: The 24-hour cancellation rule defines the purchase boundary.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: Cancellation is available for 24 hours at a 10-percent cost; physical return is verified.
instinkt.familiarity: The destination is distant, but the route, lodging, transport, and companion context are verified.
instinkt.recoverability: Most of the purchase is financially recoverable inside 24 hours; physical return is verified.

option_consequences.consequence: Self enters verified travel with a trusted companion and a bounded financial cancellation loss.
Self enters a smaller local travel scene with the same trusted companion and no stated distant-trip commitment.
Self preserves the travel budget; no claim is made that home is universally free of danger.

canonical_sl.event: Self se odloča o potovanju na redko in privlačno obalno destinacijo.

facts.text: Destinacija, pot in obalno doživetje so za self izrecno privlačni.
Potovanje stane 1200 EUR oziroma 25 odstotkov prostega proračuna.
Ista ponudba je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Rezervacijo je mogoče preklicati v 24 urah z 10-odstotnim stroškom.
S selfom potuje zaupanja vredna bližnja oseba.
Prevoz, nastanitev in povratna pot so preverjeni.
Potovanje je izrecno samo prostočasno in prijetno doživetje; ne vključuje poslovne, lastniške, izobraževalne ali druge strateške oziroma materialne koristi.
Self je prejemnik izrecno prijetnega doživetja; ločen strateški ali materialni prejemnik ne obstaja.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, kako zadovoljivo bo prostočasno doživetje.

options.description: Rezerviraj opisano potovanje.
Izberi cenejši lokalni obalni izlet.
Ne rezerviraj potovanja in ostani doma.

facts.text: The destination, route, and coastal experience are explicitly attractive to self.
The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The same offer was available once during the last three years.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
A trusted close person travels with self.
Transport, lodging, and the return path are verified.
The trip is explicitly only a leisure and pleasurable experience; it includes no business, ownership, educational, or other strategic or material benefit.
Self receives the explicitly pleasurable experience; there is no separate strategic or material beneficiary.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
How satisfying the leisure experience will be is unknown.

options.description: Book the described trip.
Take a cheaper local coastal trip.
Do not book travel and remain at home.

time_sequence: Booking occurs before the 24-hour cancellation boundary.
Travel occurs after booking.
Possible future costs occur after the purchase.
racio.explicit_goal: Decide whether to spend the stated budget amount on the explicitly pleasurable experience.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Self commits EUR 1200 for a stated pleasurable experience with no separate strategic or material return.
Self incurs a smaller unquantified cost for a local coastal experience with no separate strategic or material return.
Self preserves the travel budget and receives no travel experience.

racio.opportunity_cost: Travel spending cannot cover other unknown costs; not travelling gives up the explicitly stated experience.
racio.enforceability_control: The cancellation rule is documented; satisfaction and future costs are not controlled outcomes.

emocio.current_scene: Self and a trusted companion face an attractive distant coast, a smaller local coast, and a home path.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is centered in vivid coastal movement and immediate shared experience, without a public-recognition scene.
emocio.broken_scene: The coast remains outside the active scene and self has no travel movement or new experience.
emocio.self_position: Centered at the route decision point beside the companion.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The inactive route and booking threshold are obstacles; no rival is present.
emocio.attraction_enjoyment: The distant coast is explicitly attractive; the local coast carries a smaller but still grounded experience image.
emocio.movement_immediacy: The distant and local options start different travel scenes; staying home leaves the routes inactive.

option_visible_changes.change: Self and the companion enter the distant coastal route.
Self and the companion enter the smaller local coastal route.
Both coastal routes remain inactive and self stays in the home scene.

instinkt.protected_target: Self's physical integrity, trusted attachment context, return ability, and necessary budget reserve.
instinkt.danger_types: No unverified travel danger is grounded; general travel exposure remains bounded.
instinkt.possible_loss: A 25-percent budget commitment and 10-percent cancellation cost are possible losses.
instinkt.trust_distrust: A trusted close companion and verified providers are grounded.
instinkt.attachment_care: The trusted close companion remains with self through the travel options.
instinkt.scarcity: The distant trip uses 25 percent of the discretionary budget; future major costs are unknown.
instinkt.boundary: The 24-hour cancellation rule defines the purchase boundary.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: Cancellation is available for 24 hours at a 10-percent cost; physical return is verified.
instinkt.familiarity: The destination is distant, but the route, lodging, transport, and companion context are verified.
instinkt.recoverability: Most of the purchase is financially recoverable inside 24 hours; physical return is verified.

option_consequences.consequence: Self enters verified travel with a trusted companion and a bounded financial cancellation loss.
Self enters a smaller local travel scene with the same trusted companion and no stated distant-trip commitment.
Self preserves the travel budget; no claim is made that home is universally free of danger.

canonical_sl.event: Procesna temperatura hitro narašča ob nasprotujočih si senzorjih.

facts.text: Procesna temperatura je v šestih minutah narasla za 11 C.
Rezervni senzor kaže 8 C manj od primarnega; pravilnost odčitkov ni potrjena.
Odločitev mora biti sprejeta v treh minutah.
Nadaljnje segrevanje lahko poškoduje opremo.
Nadzorovan shutdown povzroči 75000 EUR neposredne izgube.
Za nobeno možnost ni dodane grožnje povračilnega ukrepa ali kaznovanja operaterja.
Odločitev v živo opazujejo vodja obrata in osem članov izmene; občinstvo je nevtralno ali podporno.
Uspešno obvladovanje dogodka bo z imenom operaterja zapisano v pregled usposobljenosti in vidno istemu občinstvu; plača in tehnična odgovornost se ne spremenita.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kateri senzor je pravilen.
Ni znano, ali je oprema že poškodovana.

options.description: Takoj izvedi nadzorovan shutdown.
Največ tri minute preverjaj oba senzorja in nato ponovno odloči.
Nadaljuj proizvodnjo pri trenutnih nastavitvah.

operational_en.event: Process temperature is rising rapidly while sensors disagree.

facts.text: Process temperature rose by 11 C during six minutes.
The backup sensor reads 8 C below the primary sensor; neither reading is confirmed.
A decision must be made within three minutes.
Further heating can damage equipment.
A controlled shutdown causes a direct loss of EUR 75000.
No retaliation or operator-punishment threat is added to any option.
The plant manager and eight shift members observe the decision live; the audience is neutral or supportive.
Successful handling will be entered under the operator's name in the competency review and visible to the same audience; pay and technical responsibility do not change.

unknowns.text: Which sensor is correct is unknown.
Whether equipment is already damaged is unknown.

options.description: Execute a controlled shutdown immediately.
Verify both sensors for no more than three minutes and then decide again.
Continue production at the current settings.

time_sequence: The 11 C rise occurs during the six minutes before the decision.
The decision window lasts three minutes.
Heating or shutdown consequences follow the selected option.
racio.explicit_goal: Limit equipment damage and avoid unnecessary direct loss during the three-minute decision window.

material_strategic_consequences.consequence: Heat input stops and a direct EUR 75000 loss occurs.
Sensor information can improve while heat exposure continues for up to three minutes.
The direct shutdown loss is avoided while the documented heating and damage possibility continue.

racio.opportunity_cost: Shutdown gives up EUR 75000; verification gives up up to three minutes of hazard reduction; continuation gives up immediate hazard removal.
racio.enforceability_control: The operator controls the listed process action but does not control sensor truth or existing damage.

emocio.current_scene: Self is at the controls before the plant manager and eight shift members while the rising gauge and conflicting displays hold attention.
emocio.desired_scene: Self is centered in a visibly successful handling scene where decisive action removes the process obstacle and the named audience recognizes the operator.
emocio.broken_scene: The warning and unresolved process dominate the visible scene while self loses the recognized control position.
emocio.self_position: At the controls before the named audience.
emocio.audience: Plant manager and eight shift members, neutral or supportive.
emocio.attention_recognition: Attention is on the event and self's handling; successful handling creates named visible recognition without a material reward.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The rising heat, conflicting displays, and unresolved process are obstacles; no human rival is present.
emocio.movement_immediacy: Each option creates an immediate, visibly different operator action.

option_visible_changes.change: Self executes the stop sequence before the audience and the active heat input leaves the scene.
Self moves between the displays before the audience while the unresolved heat obstacle remains for up to three minutes.
Self keeps production moving before the audience while the rising-heat obstacle remains visible.

instinkt.protected_target: Operator and equipment integrity, escape from escalating heat, and recoverable plant resources.
instinkt.danger_types: Rising heat, conflicting sensor truth, possible equipment damage, and time-limited exposure.
instinkt.possible_loss: Equipment damage or EUR 75000 shutdown loss.
instinkt.attachment_care: Protection of the shift members is relevant only as a bounded physical-integrity target; no injury evidence is added.
instinkt.scarcity: Shutdown consumes EUR 75000 of plant resources.
instinkt.boundary: The three-minute window and listed process actions define the operational boundary.
instinkt.escape_reversibility: Shutdown stops heat input; verification delays escape for up to three minutes; continuation preserves exposure.
instinkt.familiarity: The operator is in the existing plant and known control process.
instinkt.recoverability: Shutdown loss is stated but restart recovery is unknown; equipment recovery after damage is unknown.

option_consequences.consequence: Heat input stops and the plant incurs EUR 75000 loss; restart recovery remains unknown.
Conflicting readings are examined while heat exposure continues for no more than three minutes.
Rising-heat exposure and possible equipment damage continue.

facts.text: Procesna temperatura je v šestih minutah narasla za 11 C.

Odločitev se izvede brez opazovalcev in se shrani samo v anonimen tehnični dnevnik.
Uspešno obvladovanje ne bo pripisano operaterju ter ne spremeni priznanja, statusa, plače ali tehnične odgovornosti.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, kateri senzor je pravilen.
Ni znano, ali je oprema že poškodovana.

The decision is performed without observers and is stored only in an anonymous technical log.

emocio.broken_scene: The warning and unresolved process dominate the scene while self's action does not realize the intended control image.
emocio.attention_recognition: The process event holds self's attention; no external recognition or status change is grounded.
emocio.rival_or_obstacle: The rising heat, conflicting displays, and unresolved process are obstacles; no human rival is present.
